en: Open Queue — first column is Check-in. Tap Check in to Waiting for each patient who arrived.
tr: açık sıra — first column is check-in. Tap check-in yap to bekliyor for each hasta who geldi.

en: Booking schedules a future arrival. Use Queue > Patient arrival if the patient is already in clinic.
tr: Booking schedules a future geliş. Use sıra > hasta geliş if hasta is already in klinik.

en: Read-only appointment scheduler view. Review who is booked, which dentist is assigned, the visit reason, and daily load without changing live appointments.
tr: Read-only randevu scheduler görüntüle. incele who is booked, which diş hekimi is assigned, the ziyaret reason, and daily load without changing canlı randevus.

en: Patient check-in is on the Queue board
tr: hasta check-in is on the sıra board

en: Review recent completed appointments and open the patient chart to sign a note for the visit.
tr: incele recent tamamlandı randevus and açık hasta chart to sign a note for the ziyaret.

en: Completed visits may need clinical notes
tr: tamamlandı ziyaretler may need klinik nots

en: Use this board to see which days are packed, who is booked, and what kind of visit is coming before you switch into the full appointment scheduler.
tr: Use this board to see which gün are packed, who is booked, and what kind of ziyaret is coming before you switch into the full randevu scheduler.

en: Read-only monthly view showing time, patient, assigned dentist, and visit reason before you open the live scheduler.
tr: Read-only monthly görüntüle showing saat, hasta, assigned diş hekimi, and ziyaret reason before you açık the canlı scheduler.

en: Quick read of schedule pressure, leakage, and chair demand for the selected window.
tr: Quick read of schedule pressure, leakage, and chair demand for the selected window.

en: Pick an open slot for the appointment.
tr: Pick an açık slot for the randevu.

en: Working hours configured for this dentist.
tr: Working hours configured for this diş hekimi.

en: This patient has no invoices yet. Start from the treatment plan or create a manual invoice.
tr: This hasta has no faturalar yet. Start from the tedavi planı or oluştur a manuel fatura.

en: Outstanding billing must be reviewed before check-in. Collect payment or override if authorized.
tr: Outstanding faturalama must be reviewed before check-in. Collect ödeme or override if authorized.

en: Sandbox mode: checkout links are placeholders until PAYMONGO_SECRET_KEY is configured on the server. Open the link to preview, then record payment after the patient pays.
tr: Sandbox mode: checkout links are placeholders until PAYMONGO_SECRET_KEY is configured on the server. açık the link to preview, then record ödeme after hasta pays.

en: Draft claims are prepared here, then submitted for provider review and settlement.
tr: taslak talepler are prepared here, then gönderildi for provider incele and settlement.

en: Prepare, review, and settle provider claims from one queue.
tr: Prepare, incele, and settle provider talepler from one sıra.

en: Invoices, payments, HMO claims, and PhilHealth sync in one place.
tr: faturalar, ödemeler, HMO talepler, and PhilHealth sync in one place.

en: Live PayMongo checkout is active. Open the checkout link, then mark the invoice paid after confirmation.
tr: canlı PayMongo checkout is aktif. açık the checkout link, then mark the fatura ödendi after confirmation.

en: Return to the patient chart or print a receipt for checkout.
tr: Return to hasta chart or yazdır a receipt for checkout.

en: Seven-day collections trends and accounts-receivable aging live in Reports finance.
tr: Seven-gün collections trends and accounts-receivable aging canlı in raporlar finance.

en: After collecting payment or reviewing billing, return to the queue to complete check-in.
tr: After collecting ödeme or reviewing faturalama, return to the sıra to complete check-in.

en: The system calculates these times **completely autonomously** from patient movements on the Queue screen.
tr: The system calculates these times **completely autonomously** from hasta movements on the sıra screen.

en: chart finding(s) can be added to a treatment plan as matched procedures.
tr: chart finding(s) can be added to a tedavi planı as matched procedures.

en: Comparing {day} with the previous clinic day ({prev}).
tr: Comparing {gün} with the önceki klinik gün ({prev}).

en: This day is finalized — billing is locked
tr: This gün is finalized — faturalama is locked

en: This locks invoice and payment edits for today
tr: This locks fatura and ödeme edits for bugün

en: Run at end of shift to lock billing for this day
tr: Run at end of shift to lock faturalama for this gün

en: Clinic day finalized — billing is locked for today
tr: klinik gün finalized — faturalama is locked for bugün

en: This clinic day is finalized. Invoice and payment edits are locked; admins can reopen today
tr: This klinik gün is finalized. fatura and ödeme edits are locked; admins can reopen bugün

en: Day-over-day table compares the selected clinic day with the previous Manila calendar day.
tr: gün-over-gün table compares the selected klinik gün with the önceki Manila calendar gün.

en: Numbers refresh from billing, appointments, queue, and inventory — they change during the day.
tr: Numbers yenile from faturalama, randevus, sıra, and envanter — they change during the gün.

en: Save draft snapshot anytime for audit — it does not lock billing. Finalize at end of shift to lock invoice edits for the day.
tr: kaydet taslak snapshot anytime for denetim — it does not lock faturalama. Finalize at end of shift to lock fatura edits for the gün.

en: Viewing closeout for a past clinic day. Use Today to close the current shift.
tr: Viewing closeout for a past klinik gün. Use bugün to close the current shift.

en: Admin-only undo for an accidental same-day closeout
tr: Admin-only undo for an accidental same-gün closeout

en: Clinic day reopened — billing edits are unlocked
tr: klinik gün reopened — faturalama edits are unlocked

en: Save a draft anytime. Use Finalize at end of shift to lock billing for the day.
tr: kaydet a taslak anytime. Use Finalize at end of shift to lock faturalama for the gün.

en: Snapshots can only be saved for today
tr: Snapshots can only be saved for bugün

en: Review collections, open balances, and exceptions before closing the day.
tr: incele collections, açık balances, and exceptions before closing the gün.

en: Complete and sign this form first — queue check-in stays blocked until it is signed.
tr: Complete and sign this form first — sıra check-in stays blocked until it is signed.

en: You may close this page or return to the front desk.
tr: You may close this page or return to the front desk.

en: Return to the kiosk to finish check-in.
tr: Return to the kiosk to finish check-in.

en: Open balance remains — settle invoices before closeout.
tr: açık bakiye remains — settle faturalar before closeout.

en: Open balance and missing notes — review before closing the day.
tr: açık bakiye and eksik notes — incele before closing the gün.

en: Operations, finance, patients, and compliance — last {days} days at this branch.
tr: Operations, finance, hastas, and compliance — last {gün} gün at this şube.

en: Live branch totals — open modules for actions
tr: canlı şube totals — açık modules for aksiyonlar

en: No cross-branch activity in the last 7 days.
tr: No cross-şube activity in the last 7 gün.

en: for branch benchmarks and finance breakdown.
tr: for şube benchmarks and finance breakdown.

en: Showing only your patients in today
tr: Showing only your hastas in bugün

en: New check-ins will appear in the waiting queue.
tr: New check-ins will appear in the bekliyor sıra.

en: Have a seat — we will call your queue number shortly
tr: Have a seat — we will call your sıra number shortly

en: Scheduled today but not on the board
tr: planlandı bugün but not on the board

en: Follow up on payment this week
tr: Follow up on ödeme this hafta

en: Automation inbox — recall, overdue, no-show, and intake gaps
tr: Automation inbox — recall, gecikmiş, gelmeyen, and intake gaps

en: Please proceed to the front desk
tr: Please proceed to the front desk

en: Registration could not be submitted. Please see the front desk.
tr: Registration could not be gönderildi. Please see the front desk.

en: Check-in successful. Your queue number is ${queueCode.split(
tr: check-in successful. Your sıra number is ${queueCode.split(

en: Registration received. Please wait for the front desk.
tr: Registration received. Please wait for the front desk.

en: Your registration has been received but is pending approval at the front desk. Kaydınız alınmıştır ancak henüz banko tarafından onaylanmamıştır.
tr: Your registration has been received but is bekleyen approval at the front desk. Kaydınız alınmıştır ancak henüz banko tarafından onaylanmamıştır.

en: Send an impression or order to an external lab.
tr: Send an impression or order to an external lab.

en: Invoices in PHP minor units, payment ledger, HMO claim tracking, and PhilHealth eClaims readiness with audit-friendly records.
tr: faturalar in PHP minor units, ödeme ledger, HMO talep tracking, and PhilHealth eClaims readiness with denetim-friendly records.

en: FDI odontogram, tooth findings, treatment plans, and clinical notes stay linked to the same patient profile your billing team uses.
tr: FDI odontogram, tooth findings, tedavi planıs, and klinik nots stay linked to the same hasta profile your faturalama team uses.

en: Owners and front desk see today
tr: Owners and front desk see bugün

en: Large-format queue codes for the waiting area. Now serving and up next — calm typography, no PHI beyond first names.
tr: Large-format sıra codes for the bekliyor area. Now serving and up sonraki — calm typography, no PHI beyond first names.

en: Patients check in at the branch tablet, confirm contact details, and receive a queue number — no raw errors on screen.
tr: hastas check-in yap at the şube tablet, confirm contact details, and receive a sıra number — no raw errors on screen.

en: Walk through the modules your Philippine clinic team uses every day — with live data when showcase seed is configured.
tr: Walk through the modules your Philippine klinik team uses every gün — with canlı data when showcase seed is configured.

en: One system from front desk to chair side
tr: One system from front desk to chair side
isteğe bağlı notes for receiving physician…

en: Standard TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN format — edit findings and print.
tr: Standard TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN format — düzenle findings and yazdır.

en: Try a different name or phone number.
tr: Try a different name or phone number.

en: Chair flow is managed on Queue — not here.
tr: Chair flow is managed on sıra — not here.

en: New patients from the kiosk tablet or online portal — review and register before end of day.
tr: New hastas from the kiosk tablet or online portal — incele and register before end of gün.

en: Clinical summary letter for referral, insurance, or handover — {name}
tr: Clinical summary letter for referral, insurance, or handover — {name}

en: Review auto-filled summaries from the chart, edit as needed, then print.
tr: incele auto-filled summaries from the chart, düzenle as needed, then yazdır.

en: Fit-to-work, rest, or procedure certificate for {name}
tr: Fit-to-work, rest, or procedure certificate for {name}

en: Patient growth, intake completion, and consent trends live in Reports.
tr: hasta growth, intake completion, and onam trends canlı in raporlar.

en: Use the branch switcher in the top bar.
tr: Use the şube switcher in the top bar.

en: Select a branch to view patients
tr: Select a şube to görüntüle hastas

en: No scheduled arrivals waiting for check-in. Use Patient arrival for registered walk-ins, or New walk-in patient for first-time patients.
tr: No planlandı geliş bekliyor for check-in. Use hasta geliş for registered walk-ins, or New walk-in hasta for first-saat hastas.

en: Consent is required before check-in. Open the required form to sign, or override if clinic policy allows it.
tr: onam is zorunlu before check-in. açık the zorunlu form to sign, or override if klinik policy allows it.

en: Mark Served when treatment ends. Workflow can draft an invoice; collect payment in Billing, then close the visit.
tr: Mark tamamlandı when treatment ends. Workflow can taslak an fatura; collect ödeme in faturalama, then close the ziyaret.

en: Move patients Waiting → Called → In Chair on the board. Clinical notes and chart open from the dentist workspace.
tr: Move hastas bekliyor → çağrıldı → koltukta on the board. klinik nots and chart açık from the diş hekimi workspace.

en: Create the patient file first. The form returns here with the patient selected for check-in.
tr: oluştur hasta file first. The form returns here with hasta selected for check-in.

en: Use Patient arrival to search an existing file, add the reason, and check in to Waiting.
tr: Use hasta geliş to ara an existing file, ekle the reason, and check-in yap to bekliyor.

en: Appears in Check-in on appointment day. Front desk confirms arrival and moves them to Waiting.
tr: Appears in check-in on randevu gün. Front desk confirms geliş and moves them to bekliyor.

en: Check-in opens the visit, creates the queue card, and places the patient in Waiting. Appointment booking alone is not a clinic arrival.
tr: check-in opens the ziyaret, creates the sıra card, and places hasta in bekliyor. randevu booking alone is not a klinik geliş.

en: Every physical arrival is checked in from Queue.
tr: Every physical geliş is checked in from sıra.

en: Open and sign the required consent form
tr: açık and sign the zorunlu onam form

en: Read-only snapshot for the selected clinic day.
tr: Read-only snapshot for the selected klinik gün.

en: Front desk checks in arrivals here. After check-in, move patients Waiting -> Called -> In Chair -> Complete.
tr: Front desk checks in geliş here. After check-in, move hastas bekliyor -> çağrıldı -> koltukta -> Complete.

en: No queue entries on this clinic day.
tr: No sıra entries on this klinik gün.

en: Viewing queue history for {day}. Switch to Today for live check-in and flow.
tr: Viewing sıra history for {gün}. Switch to bugün for canlı check-in and flow.

en: Kiosk, TV display, and portal links
tr: Kiosk, TV display, and portal links

en: Arrival speed, wait duration, and chair movement live in Reports — keep this screen for live flow only.
tr: geliş speed, wait duration, and chair movement canlı in raporlar — keep this screen for canlı flow only.

en: Return here after resolving billing — tap Complete check-in when ready.
tr: Return here after resolving faturalama — tap Complete check-in when hazır.

en: Scheduled patients check in here, become a Waiting queue entry, then move to Chair and checkout.
tr: planlandı hastas check-in yap here, become a bekliyor sıra entry, then move to Chair and checkout.

en: Compare branches across appointments and collections in the same period. This is the fastest way to spot underperforming sites.
tr: Compare şubeler across randevus and collections in the same period. This is the fastest way to spot underperforming sites.

en: Useful when owners want to see where AR pressure is accumulating across the group.
tr: Useful when owners want to see where AR pressure is accumulating across the group.

en: How busy the calendar has been across the selected period.
tr: How busy the calendar has been across the selected period.

en: Payments posted each day for the active branch.
tr: ödemeler posted each gün for the aktif şube.

en: Kiosk, TV display, and public-link controls
tr: Kiosk, TV display, and public-link controls

en: This section combines daily collections, AR aging, HMO pipeline, and PhilHealth readiness so finance can act without hopping between modules.
tr: This section combines daily collections, AR aging, HMO pipeline, and PhilHealth readiness so finance can act without hopping between modules.

en: Review schedule volume, monthly booking board, status mix, no-shows, and queue conversion for the selected period.
tr: incele schedule volume, monthly booking board, durum mix, gelmeyens, and sıra conversion for the selected period.

en: Collections, open balances, AR, HMO, and PhilHealth signals are grouped in Finance for action.
tr: Collections, açık balances, AR, HMO, and PhilHealth signals are grouped in Finance for aksiyon.

en: Use queue pressure, waiting duration, and chair-time panels to see where front-desk handoffs slow down.
tr: Use sıra pressure, bekliyor duration, and chair-saat panels to see where front-desk handoffs slow down.

en: Live board, check-in, and patient flow
tr: canlı board, check-in, and hasta flow

en: Track schedule occupancy, queue pressure, waitlist conversion, kiosk intake behavior, and chair-time efficiency from one section.
tr: Track schedule occupancy, sıra pressure, bekleme listesi conversion, kiosk intake behavior, and chair-saat efficiency from one section.

en: Read the schedule like the appointment page: who is booked, which dentist is assigned, the visit reason, and daily load.
tr: Read the schedule like the randevu page: who is booked, which diş hekimi is assigned, the ziyaret reason, and daily load.

en: Owners can compare visit volume and collections side by side here instead of opening each branch one at a time.
tr: Owners can compare ziyaret volume and collections side by side here instead of opening each şube one at a saat.

en: This view highlights how long the branch is spending in active treatment so owners can see whether schedule pressure is turning into productive chair time.
tr: This görüntüle highlights how long the şube is spending in aktif treatment so owners can see whether schedule pressure is turning into productive chair saat.

en: Review active chart conditions and unresolved findings so the branch can keep treatment planning anchored to current clinical reality.
tr: incele aktif chart conditions and unresolved findings so the şube can keep treatment planning anchored to current clinical reality.

en: Monitor kiosk and TV status here so patients are not looking at stale queue information or a dead waiting-room screen.
tr: Monitor kiosk and TV durum here so hastas are not looking at stale sıra information or a dead bekliyor-room screen.

en: Use this summary to see whether money collected today is keeping up with open balances and whether billing follow-up should happen before day close.
tr: Use this summary to see whether money tahsil edildi bugün is keeping up with açık balances and whether faturalama follow-up should happen before gün close.

en: Low stock and stock pressure appear here so the branch can prevent treatment interruptions caused by avoidable supply gaps.
tr: Low stok and stok pressure appear here so the şube can prevent treatment interruptions caused by avoidable supply gaps.

en: Watch self-check-in and intake completion so reception can intervene before the patient reaches the dentist without a complete file.
tr: Watch self-check-in and intake completion so reception can intervene before hasta reaches the diş hekimi without a complete file.

en: Watch template usage and delivery health to make sure reminders, recalls, and payment follow-ups actually reach patients.
tr: Watch şablon usage and delivery health to make sure reminders, recalls, and ödeme follow-ups actually reach hastas.

en: This panel shows adjustment workload and future ortho follow-ups, which helps the team spot recurring specialty demand before it crowds general slots.
tr: This panel shows adjustment workload and future ortho follow-ups, which helps the team spot recurring specialty demand before it crowds general slots.

en: Use this panel when the front desk needs to see whether arrivals are moving into chair time fast enough or whether staff handoffs are slowing down.
tr: Use this panel when the front desk needs to see whether geliş are moving into chair saat fast enough or whether staff handoffs are slowing down.

en: Review branch public links and token state so staff can close stale access paths before they create front-desk confusion.
tr: incele şube public links and token state so staff can close stale access paths before they oluştur front-desk confusion.

en: Shows how much demand is waiting off-calendar so staff can convert open slots into real visits instead of leaving chairs idle.
tr: Shows how much demand is bekliyor off-calendar so staff can convert açık slots into real ziyaretler instead of leaving chairs idle.

en: Branch operations summary for the selected reporting window.
tr: şube operations summary for the selected reporting window.

en: These links open the operational screens where the numbers above are created, corrected, and closed.
tr: These links açık the operational screens where the numbers above are created, corrected, and kapalı.

en: Use these top-line charts to spot branch momentum fast: visit volume, cash movement, and appointment status mix.
tr: Use these top-line charts to spot şube momentum fast: ziyaret volume, cash movement, and randevu durum mix.

en: See whether the branch is completing visits or leaking them through no-shows and cancellations.
tr: See whether the şube is completing ziyaretler or leaking them through gelmeyens and cancellations.

en: Toggle which KPI alerts appear on the owner dashboard for this branch.
tr: Toggle which KPI alerts appear on the owner panel for this şube.

en: Run the paper consent migration in Supabase, then refresh. Global templates will appear here for org overrides.
tr: Run the paper onam migration in Supabase, then yenile. Global şablonlar will appear here for org overrides.

en: Open the admin modules for clinic profile, branches, staff, permissions, messaging, consent templates, audit, and workflow automation.
tr: açık the admin modules for klinik profile, şubeler, staff, permissions, messaging, onam şablonlar, denetim, and workflow automation.

en: Configure channels, templates, and delivery logs for this branch.
tr: Configure channels, şablonlar, and delivery logs for this şube.

en: Messages are logged but not sent to a real SMS provider yet.
tr: Messages are logged but not sent to a real SMS provider yet.

en: Live send mode — test messages use the SMS provider.
tr: canlı send mode — test messages use the SMS provider.

en: Opens the same preview in WhatsApp. No paid WhatsApp API is used; keep SMS dry-run on while testing templates.
tr: Opens the same preview in WhatsApp. No ödendi WhatsApp API is used; keep SMS dry-run on while testing şablonlar.

en: No messages logged yet. Send a test from Templates.
tr: No messages logged yet. Send a test from şablonlar.

en: WhatsApp popup was blocked by the browser.
tr: WhatsApp popup was blocked by the browser.

en: Template usage and delivery health trends are in Reports compliance.
tr: şablon usage and delivery health trends are in raporlar compliance.

en: Materials auto-deduct from inventory when the procedure is marked served.
tr: Materials auto-deduct from envanter when the procedure is marked tamamlandı.

en: Branch-level automation rules. Toggle per branch; changes are audited.
tr: şube-level automation rules. Toggle per şube; changes are audited.

en: Previous note {title} from {code} can pre-fill today
tr: önceki note {title} from {code} can pre-fill bugün

en: When the patient arrives, open Patient arrival from Queue. Check-in creates the visit and puts them in Waiting.
tr: When hasta arrives, açık hasta geliş from sıra. check-in creates the ziyaret and puts them in bekliyor.

en: Each arrival is a separate visit. Tap a row to review queue, notes, chart, plan, and billing for that day.
tr: Each geliş is a separate ziyaret. Tap a row to incele sıra, notes, chart, plan, and faturalama for that gün.

en: Send this patient to Queue when they physically arrive. Check-in opens today
tr: Send this hasta to sıra when they physically arrive. check-in opens bugün

en: Every check-in is a separate visit — expand each row to control queue, notes, chart, plan, and billing.
tr: Every check-in is a separate ziyaret — expand each row to control sıra, notes, chart, plan, and faturalama.

en: FIFO with urgency when slots open
tr: FIFO with urgency when slots açık

en: First-in-first-served queue with urgency priority when slots open.
tr: First-in-first-tamamlandı sıra with urgency priority when slots açık.

en: Conversion and contact trends for open waitlist demand are in Reports.
tr: Conversion and contact trends for açık bekleme listesi demand are in raporlar.
